description: Minute-precision intra-day attack timeline. Events alternate left/right of a central spine. Use for stories with specific clock times (5:58AM, 11:59PM, 12:07AM). Supports up to 6 events.

fields.TITLE_TEXT: Title above the timeline, e.g. 'NIGHT OF THE ATTACK'
fields.DATE_LABEL: The date this timeline covers, e.g. 'MARCH 30–31, 2026'
fields.TIME_LABEL_1: Clock time for event 1, e.g. '5:58 AM'
fields.EVENT_LABEL_1: Description of event 1, e.g. 'Malicious package first published to npm registry'
fields.TIME_LABEL_2: Clock time for event 2, e.g. '11:59 PM'
fields.EVENT_LABEL_2: Description of event 2, e.g. 'Axios publishes v1.8.4 — current branch poisoned'
fields.TIME_LABEL_3: Clock time for event 3, e.g. '12:01 AM'
fields.EVENT_LABEL_3: Description of event 3, e.g. 'Legacy v0.x branch also poisoned — both versions compromised'
fields.TIME_LABEL_4: Clock time for event 4, e.g. '12:07 AM'
fields.EVENT_LABEL_4: Description of event 4, e.g. 'First developer reports suspicious behavior on GitHub'
fields.TIME_LABEL_5: Clock time for event 5, e.g. '3:01 AM'
fields.EVENT_LABEL_5: Description of event 5, e.g. 'Axios team pulls both poisoned versions from npm'
fields.TIME_LABEL_6: Clock time for event 6 (leave blank if fewer than 6 events), e.g. ''
fields.EVENT_LABEL_6: Description of event 6 (leave blank if fewer than 6 events), e.g. ''
